ideation: This animation sequence depicts a robot carefully pouring water, emphasizing precision and care. The robot's arms will move in a coordinated way, simulating the action of pouring liquid from a container. Frame 1 shows the robot with both arms extended, the left arm slightly forward, holding a virtual container. The right arm is positioned slightly behind, ready to receive the water. Frame 2 shows the left arm moving slightly downward, tilting the virtual container to simulate pouring. The right arm moves slightly forward to receive the water. Frame 3 shows the left arm further tilted, with the right arm positioned to catch the water. Frame 4 shows the left arm returning to its initial position, while the right arm remains steady, as if holding the water. Frame 5 shows the robot with both arms at rest, completing the action.

frames.beat: arms poised, ready to pour with care
left arm tilts, beginning the gentle pour
the water flows, caught by the waiting right hand
left arm straightens, right hand holds steady
the pouring action is complete, arms rest
